overall.description: A first-person walk along a flooded desert highway in a dystopian game setting (Cyberpunk 2077). The player approaches an abandoned toll gantry before turning to track a large flying transport vehicle passing overhead near a Night City billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned flooded desert highway approaching toll gantry

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the flooded highway toward the distant toll gantry structure

entered.detail: concrete barriers with red and white stripes lining the left side of the flooded road
large overhead highway toll structure visible in the distance
scattered desert trees lining both sides of the highway
derelict structure with greenish panels visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a rain-soaked desert highway, passing red and white striped barriers. Joshua trees dot the wasteland landscape on both sides while a large toll gantry looms ahead in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway outskirts with aerial traffic and city billboard

events.description: camera turns right to track an object in the sky
large flying transport vehicle enters the frame from the right

agents.ego_description: turning to the right to watch the flying transport vehicle pass overhead

notable_agents.action: large flying transport aircraft moving from right to left across the hazy sky

entered.detail: massive aerial vehicle with glowing engines flying overhead
large sign with 'Night City' text visible on the right side
tall metal pylon with power lines
distant structures and smokestacks on the horizon

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the toll gantry, it turns right to reveal a massive flying transport vehicle passing overhead. The view opens to show a large 'Night City' billboard, electrical towers, and distant industrial buildings while the aircraft continues its flight across the gray sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate, rain-soaked highway that leads toward a looming industrial structure. It begins by gliding past red and white striped barriers on a flooded road, with the camera tracking straight ahead through the wasteland. As the movement continues, the surrounding landscape reveals scattered Joshua trees under a heavy, oppressive atmosphere. The scene then focuses on the horizon, where a large toll gantry gradually emerges from the hazy distance to dominate the view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a focused approach toward a roadside structure to a wide, sweeping view of a dystopian skyline. It begins by moving toward an abandoned toll gantry before turning right to reveal a massive flying transport vehicle gliding overhead. As the camera tracks the aircraft, the view opens to encompass a towering Night City billboard and a network of electrical towers. The scene then expands further to show distant industrial buildings silhouetted against a heavy, gray sky as the vehicle continues its flight across the horizon.
